name: XOR-Masked Counter (Obfuscated)
description: ECU XORs a simple 16-bit counter with fixed mask 0xA5A5. Superficially looks random, but XOR-ing any two adjacent seeds always gives 0x0001, revealing the hidden counter. Analyzer shows near-constant absolute delta.
expected_predictor_result: Constant |delta| of ~1 in Δ CHART — XOR mask trivially reversible
